strengths: Proven technical leadership and software development experience
Strong background in AI and cloud technologies through various projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy
Limited experience in advising customers on cutting-edge technologies

response.justification: The candidate has a strong technical background with diverse experience in software development and some exposure to AI and cloud technologies, but lacks direct experience in AI strategy and advising customers on cutting-edge technologies.
